title: Figure 2 from: Stoof-Leichsenring KR, Liu S, Jia W, Li K, Pestryakova LA, Mischke S, Cao X, Liu X, Ni J, Neuhaus S, Herzschuh U (2020) Plant diversity in sedimentary DNA obtained from high-latitude (Siberia) and high-elevation lakes (China). Biodiversity Data Journal 8: e57089. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.8.e57089
author: Stoof-Leichsenring, Kathleen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 Compilation of total read counts for each PCR sample. As PCR replicates of 13-TY samples were not sequenced separately, but pooled together, only one total read count per sample is shown.
steps_raw: Figure 2 Compilation of total read counts for each PCR sample. As PCR replicates of 13-TY samples were not sequenced separately, but pooled together, only one total read count per sample is shown.
